title: 0guard HackQuest Required X Post
text: 0guard: a pre-wallet firewall for AI agents. It checks intent -> policy -> wallet before any signature. Now: 28/28 April 2026 incidents source-linked, 28/28 detector coverage, and a 0G mainnet receipt anchor. @0G_labs @0g_CN @0g_Eco @HackQuest_ #0GHackathon #BuildOn0G
